guards.purpose: Verify that product facts, specs, assets, and output goal are present enough to choose a route.
Block unsupported review, rating, warranty, return, shipping, seller-service, and platform-endorsement claims.
Check the page against DESIGN.md rhythm, brand, typography, and anti-pattern rules.
Ensure selected components match product type, buyer questions, and available inputs.
Ensure image jobs include no readable text, no fake badge, no distorted product, and no marketplace mark constraints.
Check generated HTML/assets for required IDs, output files, and embed boundaries.
Check 390px readability, image repetition, dark-module rhythm, product drift, and text clipping.
Allow final export only when QA report has no blocking issue or has a scoped repair plan.
